summary: V34.0 Full System Test Complete. All 10 test requirements verified. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (V34.0 inverse exponential math verified). Frontend: All features working - 7-pillar hub, system-wide mixer with strip/orbital modes, collapsible mixer, marketplace accessible.

minor.issue: AxiosError in console - quests/progress endpoints failing (non-critical, doesn't affect core functionality)

context_for_next_testing_agent: V34.0 complete system test passed. All features verified: 7-pillar hub with Broadcast+Sever, system-wide mixer (strip mode with 7 faders, orbital sphere mode with 7 colored nodes), collapsible mixer (36px bar), mixer hidden on hub. Backend V34.0 inverse exponential math verified (100 dust → ~221 net at SEED tier).

tests_executed.details: All 7 pillars visible: Practice(9), Divination(9), Sanctuary(8), Nourish & Heal(8), Explore(9), Sage AI Coach(5), Sovereign Council(16). Broadcast + Sever buttons present.
Practice pillar expands showing 9 items including Breathwork navigation button.

tests_executed.test: 2. /breathing: Content in top 2/3, mixer in bottom 1/3
tests_executed.details: Conscious Breathing page renders with patterns (Box Breathing, 4-7-8 Relaxation, etc). Mixer strip visible at bottom.
All 7 pillar faders found (PRA, DIV, SAN, NOU, EXP, SAG, COU). 8 range inputs total. Mode toggle shows 'ORBITAL'. Store cart button present. Collapse chevron present.
Click mode toggle switches to orbital sphere with 7 colored nodes on dark background. Toggle shows 'STRIP' to switch back. Canvas element renders correctly.
Click collapse chevron shrinks mixer to 36px thin bar showing 7 colored level bars.
Seek the Oracle page with Tarot, Astrology, I Ching options. Draw Cards button. Mixer strip visible at bottom.
Ambient Worlds page with sound cards (Gentle Rain, Ocean Waves, Forest Ambience, Singing Bowls, Mountain Wind, Distant Thunder visible). Mixer strip visible.
Mixer strip correctly hidden on hub page. All 7 pillars + Broadcast + Sever visible.

POST /api/transmuter/work-submit with session_duration and resonance_score returns earned dust. POST /api/transmuter/transmute returns net_result with V34.0 math (100 dust → ~221 net at SEED tier). Inverse multiplier formula verified: φ^(-1/(pool+1)).
